3292270.name: Project MT
3292270.description:
Project MT is a fast-paced 2D space survival shooter where every second counts. Battle through relentless 20-second waves of enemies, each more intense than the last, as you fight for survival in deep space.

Between waves, tactically spend points earned from defeated enemies to upgrade your ship — enhance your attack power, defense systems, core capabilities, and experiment with different ammo types to match your playstyle and counter enemy behavior.

Featuring strategic progression, diverse enemy types, and responsive combat, Project MT challenges you to stay sharp and think ahead. Climb the global leaderboard, master your ship's loadout, and see how long you can survive the chaos.

Key Features:

  • Single-player 2D space survival shooter

  • 20-second enemy waves with upgrade phases between

  • Dynamic upgrade system: attack, defense, systems, and ammo types

  • Fast-paced action combined with strategic decision-making

  • Multiple enemy types with unique behaviors

  • Full keyboard and gamepad support

  • Global leaderboard to track and compete with top survivors

  • Co-op local multiplayer
